zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Beaumont於1401年9月21日出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾亞特時，他的父親William Beaumont34歲，母親Isabel Willington31歲。他和Alice Stukeley至少有2個兒子。他去世於1450年11月17日在英國戴文吉迪夏馬享年49歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Beaumont于1401年9月21日出生在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾亞特时，他的父亲William Beaumont34岁，母亲Isabel Willington31岁。他和Alice Stukeley至少有2个儿子。他去世于1450年11月17日在英国戴文吉迪夏馬享年49岁。

nameMeanings.name: Beaumont
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Gilles, Gaetan, Honore, Jacques, Jean-Guy, Marcel.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of the five places in Normandy or several others elsewhere in France so named. The placename comes from Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + mont ‘hill’. There are also places in England so named under Norman influence in Cumberland, Lancashire, and Essex, the last of which changed its name in the 12th century from Fulepet ‘foul pit’ to Bealmont ‘beautiful hill’; these may also have given rise to the surname. The surname is now widespread throughout England, but most common in Yorkshire. Compare Belmont .

History: Many English bearers of this surname are descended from Henry de Beaumont (died 1340), who came to England from France as a soldier, serving Kings Edward I, II, and III of England. He acquired the earldom of Buchan in Scotland by marriage. — Many American bearers of this surname are descendants of John Beaumont (1612–47), who came to North America from England in 1630. William Beaumont came from England to Cambridge MA in 1635 and subsequently moved to CT.

variants.name: Bement
meanings: English (Cambridgeshire): variant of   Beaumont  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Beeman
meanings: English (Kent): occupational name for a beekeeper, from Middle English bee-man ‘bee-keeper’ (Old English bēo + mann).
Americanized form of German Biemann or of its Dutch cognate Bieman.

variants.name: Belmont
meanings: French and English (of Norman origin): variant of   Beaumont  .
Catalan: habitational name from the placename Bellmont ‘beautiful mountain’. Compare Spanish   Belmonte  .

variants.name: Baumunk
meanings: German: probably a Germanized form of a French Huguenot name Beaumont (see also Beaumont ).

variants.name: Bayman
meanings: Americanized form of German Beumann or Bäumann, variants of Baumann .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Beaumont was born on 21 September 1401, in Yate, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Beaumont, was 34 and his mother, Isabel Willington, was 31. He had at least 2 sons with Alice Stukeley. He died on 17 November 1450, in Gittisham, Devon, England, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Beaumont est né le 21 septembre 1401, à Yate, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Beaumont, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Isabel Willington, avait 31 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils avec Alice Stukeley. Il est décédé le 17 novembre 1450, à Gittisham, Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 49 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Beaumont am 21. September 1401 in Yate, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Beaumont 34 und seine Mutter Isabel Willington 31. Er hatte mit Alice Stukeley mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb am 17. November 1450 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Gittisham, Devon, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Beaumont è nato il il 21 settembre 1401 nel Yate, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William Beaumont, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Isabel Willington, aveva 31 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli con Alice Stukeley. Morì il 17 novembre 1450, nel Gittisham, Devon, England, all'età di 49 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Beaumontが1401年9月21日にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアヤトで生まれた時，父William Beaumontは34歳，母Isabel Willingtonは31歳であった。彼はAlice Stukeleyとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼は1450年11月17日にイギリスデボンギッティシャムで49歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Beaumont(이)가 1401년 9월 21일 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 야트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Beaumont(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel Willington(은)는 31세였다. 그는 Alice Stukeley(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1450년 11월 17일 영국 데폰 지티샤에서 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Beaumont родился 21 сентября 1401 г. в местности ят, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Beaumont было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Isabel Willington, 31. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына от Alice Stukeley. Он умер 17 ноября 1450 г. в местности гиттишам, девон, Англия в возрасте 49 лет.
